title: Romanian women’s football is expanding rapidly, structural support now needed [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Growth in Romania’s women’s football is outpacing its ability to sustain player engagement and career pathways into adulthood, new systems are needed for longterm growth
summary_public: Growth in Romania’s women’s football is outpacing its ability to sustain player engagement and career pathways into adulthood, new systems are needed for longterm growth

RO.label: neutral
RO.evidence: Romanian women’s football is expanding rapidly
